_comment: Apps Script manifest for the SPREADSHEET-ONLY redactie review webhook.
Pair this manifest with docs/apps-script-redactie-review-webhook.gs.
This Web App reads LAB_Intake_Submissions / LAB_Editorial_Intake and
(optionally, when the dedicated action is invoked) appends rows to
LAB_Redactie_Reviews and LAB_Workflow_Events. It NEVER writes to
Directory_Master and NEVER calls MailApp / GmailApp / UrlFetchApp /
any external service. The OAuth consent screen MUST therefore
surface ONLY:
https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets
If `script.send_mail`, `gmail.*`, `drive.*` or
`script.external_request` appears during authorization, STOP and
re-check the .gs source against the spreadsheet-only contract.
Deploy as a SEPARATE Apps Script project from the intake webhook
(do not reuse the intake project — keeping them separate makes the
scope set easy to audit and lets us revoke/rotate independently).
When deploying via clasp, copy this file to the project root as
`appsscript.json` (clasp expects it there). When configuring the
Apps Script project manually in the web UI, open Project Settings
and tick "Show appsscript.json manifest file in editor", then
paste this content into appsscript.json. The explicit oauthScopes
list pins the consent screen to spreadsheets-only and prevents
Apps Script's auto-detection from re-introducing other scopes.
